answers: Learn swimming: start in shallow water, practice floating first, then kicking, then arm strokes. Take lessons if possible.
Swimming benefits: full-body workout, low impact on joints, improves cardiovascular health, reduces stress, and burns 400-700 calories/hour.
Key techniques: freestyle (fastest), backstroke (easiest on back), breaststroke (most relaxed), butterfly (most demanding).
Shatar kata tips: prothome shallow water e practice koro, floating shikho, then kick ar stroke shikho. Instructor hole valo hoy.
